SEARCH
Package com.example.eventmanager

Class AnasEvent

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventmanager.AnasEvent
public class AnasEvent extends Object
Represents an event in the lottery-based event management system. Stores entrant lists (waiting, chosen, attendees) and registration window info.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AnasEvent()
    Required empty constructor for Firestore deserialization.

    • isRegistrationWindowActive

      public boolean isRegistrationWindowActive()
      US1: Checks whether registration is currently open based on the time window.
      Returns:
      true if the current time is within [registrationStart, registrationEnd].

    • canUserJoin

      public boolean canUserJoin(String deviceId, Integer waitlistLimit)
      US1: Validates whether a user is permitted to join the waiting list. Checks registration window, duplicate join, and waitlist capacity.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - The ID of the entrant attempting to join.
      waitlistLimit - The max waitlist size (0 or null = unlimited).
      Returns:
      true if joining is permitted.

    • isUserChosen

      public boolean isUserChosen(String deviceId)
      US3 invalid input: '&' US4: Checks if a user has been selected by the lottery.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - The device ID to check.
      Returns:
      true if the user is in the chosen list.

    • hasAttendeesSpace

      public boolean hasAttendeesSpace()
      US4: Checks whether there is still space in the attendees list. Ensures capacity is not exceeded when accepting an invitation.
      Returns:
      true if attendees count is below capacity.
